# BizzSurfer Go!

> Agentic AI Intelligence for enterprise Business Transformation leaders. Connect business systems, orchestrate change with AI agents, and accelerate ROI.

BizzSurfer Go! is the executive companion app for transformation leaders adopting Agentic AI. It includes an AI chat assistant, curated insights, executive events, a marketplace of AI agents and playbooks, ROI tools, and pricing for individuals and teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Agentic AI for transformation leaders.
- [Chat](/chat): AI assistant for transformation questions.
- [Events](/events): Executive events, roundtables, and masterclasses.
- [Insights](/insights): Articles on Agentic AI and enterprise transformation.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Curated AI agents, services, and playbooks.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Individual and team plans.
- [Resources](/resources): Guides and downloadable resources.
- [Profile](/profile): Account and subscription management.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Sign in or create an account.
- [RSS feed](/feed.xml): Events and insights RSS.
- [Atom feed](/atom.xml): Events and insights Atom.
